nasb.text: ‘If there is anyone who curses his father or his mother, he shall surely be put to death; he has cursed his father or his mother, his bloodguiltiness is upon him.

esv.text: For anyone who curses his father or his mother shall surely be put to death; he has cursed his father or his mother; his blood is upon him.

cnv.text: “咒罵自己父母的，必要把他處死；他咒罵自己的父母，必須承擔流血的罪責。

ccb.text: “咒骂父母的，必被处死。他咒骂父母，必须承担自己的罪。
